zh.lifeSummary: John Pyne是George Pyne和Mrs. Susanna Pyne的兒子，於1591年3月27日之前出生。他於1618年1月21日與Anstice Rich在英國英格蘭戴文易亞斯特 唐結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1655年4月23日之前在英國，埋葬在英國戴文阿爾文頓。

nameMeanings.name: Pyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Pine  . This name has been established in Ireland since the 16th century.

variants.name: Pine
meanings: English: from Middle English pin(e) (Old English pīn, Old French pin), a topographic name for someone who lived by a conspicuous pine tree or in a pine forest; in some cases it may originally have been a nickname for a tall man, one thought to resemble a pine tree.
English: nickname from Middle English pine ‘pain, injury, torture, punishment, infirmity’, referring to someone who suffered from an inflicted pain or punishment.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Le Pin in Calvados or some other French place called from a prominent pine.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: John Pyne was born before 27 March 1591 as the son of George Pyne and Mrs. Susanna Pyne. He married Anstice Rich on 21 January 1618, in East Down, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died before 23 April 1655, in England, and was buried in Alwington, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: John Pyne est né avant 27 mars 1591, fils de George Pyne et Mrs. Susanna Pyne. Il a épousé Anstice Rich le 21 janvier 1618, à East Down, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 23 avril 1655, à Angleterre, et a été enterré à Alwington, Devon, Angleterre.

Lui sposato Anstice Rich il 21 gennaio 1618, nel East Down, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: John Pyneは1591年3月27日以前にGeorge PyneとMrs. Susanna Pyneの息子として生まれた。1618年1月21日にイギリスイギリスデボンエアスト ダウンでAnstice Richと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1655年4月23日以前にイギリスで死去し，イギリスデボンアルウィントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Pyne(은)는 1591년 3월 27일 이전 George Pyne(와)과 Mrs. Susanna Pyne의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1618년 1월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 이스트 다운에서 Anstice Rich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1655년 4월 23일 이전 영국에서 사망했으며 영국 데폰 알윙턴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: John Pyne родился перед 27 марта 1591 г. Его родителей звали George Pyne и Mrs. Susanna Pyne. Он женился на женщине по имени Anstice Rich 21 января 1618 г. в местности эаст доун, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 23 апрель 1655 г. в местности Англия и был похоронен в местности алвингтон, девон, Англия.
